about.label: About Us
about.title: Built on 25 Years of Engineering Excellence
about.description: Founded in 2001 on the basis of NPO Wolfram, SUV-TARAQQIYOT LLC has grown into one of the leading contractors for hydrogeological drilling and water supply infrastructure in the Republic of Uzbekistan. We work with government agencies, international development banks, and industrial clients across Central Asia.

drilling.title: Hydrogeological Well Drilling
drilling.desc: Professional drilling of water wells at depths from 30 to 1200 meters. Our team completes approximately 120 wells annually, serving municipal and industrial water demands across the country.

pipelines.title: Water Pipeline Construction
pipelines.desc: Design and installation of water transmission and distribution pipelines up to 200 km per year, with diameters ranging from 32 mm to 1200 mm for systems of any scale.

distribution.title: Water Distribution Units
distribution.desc: Construction of water distribution facilities with capacity from 300 to 30,000 cubic meters per day. We build up to 50 units annually to serve growing regional water demands.

towers.title: Water Towers & Intake Stations
towers.desc: Engineering and construction of water towers (10–75 m³ capacity, up to 50 per year) and water intake stations with over 5,000 m³ total volume capacity.

seoFaq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
seoFaq.title: Water Well Drilling & Water Supply — Common Questions

q1.q: Do you drill artesian wells in Tashkent and other regions of Uzbekistan?
q1.a: Yes. SUV-TARAQQIYOT LLC drills artesian and hydrogeological water wells across every region of Uzbekistan, including Tashkent, Namangan, Samarkand, Kashkadarya, Syrdarya, and the Fergana Valley. Drilling depth ranges from 30 to 1,200 metres, with around 120 wells delivered per year.

q2.q: What water pipeline diameters and materials do you install?
q2.a: We construct water transmission and distribution pipelines with diameters from 32 mm to 1,200 mm, using polyethylene (HDPE) and steel pipes. Annual installed capacity reaches up to 200 kilometres of pipeline, serving municipal water supply and industrial infrastructure projects.

q3.q: Do you deliver projects financed by the World Bank, EBRD, ADB and OPEC Fund?
q3.a: Yes. SUV-TARAQQIYOT has executed water infrastructure projects funded by the World Bank (IBRD/IDA), the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD), the Asian Development Bank (ADB), the OPEC Fund for International Development and the Saudi Fund for Development — all delivered under FIDIC contract conditions.

hero.title: Built on Engineering Excellence Since 2001
hero.subtitle: From a single drilling operation to one of Uzbekistan's leading water infrastructure contractors — 25 years of uninterrupted delivery.

story.label: OUR HISTORY
story.title: Founded on Engineering. Grown Through Delivery.
story.p1: SUV-TARAQQIYOT LLC was established on 21 August 2001, built on the foundation of NPO Wolfram — a Soviet-era scientific production organisation with deep roots in geological survey and drilling engineering. From its first year of operation, the company focused on hydrogeological well drilling and water supply construction across Uzbekistan.
story.p2: Over two decades, SUV-TARAQQIYOT has grown into a full-cycle contractor capable of delivering projects from initial survey through to final commissioning. The company annually drills approximately 120 wells to depths of up to 1,200 metres, constructs up to 200 kilometres of water pipelines with diameters from 32 to 1,200mm, and installs up to 50 water distribution units with daily capacities of 300 to 30,000 cubic metres.
story.p3: Today, SUV-TARAQQIYOT holds contracts financed by the World Bank, the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development, the Asian Development Bank, the OPEC Fund for International Development, and the Saudi Fund for Development. The company operates under ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2019, and ISO 45001:2020 certification, issued by AVVISO CERT LLC, Tashkent.
